description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a fantasy or historical warrior outfit, featuring a metallic chest armor with ornate detailing and a prominent circular emblem at the center. He wears a decorative crown or helmet with pointed accents and a mane-like feature at the back, along with matching bracers on both forearms. His lower body is clad in fitted pants secured by a wide belt with a metallic buckle, and a long cloth sash drapes from the waist. The footwear consists of simple, closed shoes. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and his facial expression is stern and focused, suggesting a character of authority or combat readiness.
description: A male adult in ornate warrior attire with a crown, chest armor, bracers, fitted pants, and a sash, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed chest armor, crown, facial features, and sash draping from the waist.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the crown, arm bracer, and the side contour of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crown with mane-like detail, the back of the armor, and the full length of the sash.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm bracer, and the side seam of the pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy warrior attire with chest armor, bracers, fitted pants, and a decorative sash
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with a mane-like feature at the back
